# Competitor Low-Star Review Audit

Public sample: https://imgold2023-dot.github.io/competitor-low-star-review-audit/

Full sample report: https://imgold2023-dot.github.io/competitor-low-star-review-audit/sample-report.html

This project is a public-information competitor low-star review audit for indie builders, SaaS founders, Shopify App developers, Chrome extension builders, and automation service providers.

Current sample category: Shopify returns and exchange apps.

Competitors covered:

- AfterShip Returns
- Loop Returns
- Return Prime
- ReturnGO
- Shopify native returns and exchanges

Core judgment:

The Shopify returns category is not closed, but a small team should not start by building another full returns platform. More realistic wedges are app-selection reviews, low-volume merchant setup help, Markets / multi-currency checks, and clearer reporting across returns, exchanges, refunds, and store credit.

Boundary:

This audit uses public information only. It does not use customer logins, private dashboards, order data, payment data, cookies, production tokens, refunds, disputes, KYC, or legal commitments.
